cards.back: A repeated game where two players make decisions to cooperate or defect in each round, with a finite number of rounds
A repeated game where two players make decisions to cooperate or defect in each round, with an infinite number of rounds
A cooperation-based strategy where a player imitates the previous action of the opponent, with a tendency to defect if the opponent defects twice in a row
A 2x2 matrix that represents the payoffs for each possible combination of cooperation (C) and defection (D) for both players
A stable state where no player can improve their payoff by unilaterally changing their strategy, assuming the other player's strategy remains constant
